title: xanthosia ternifolia
intro: Xanthosia ternifolia, also known as the Coast Bitter, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a bitter digestive aid and to stimulate the appetite. The health benefits of Xanthosia ternifolia include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. Xanthosia ternifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
